description: Google Genomics was a Google Cloud genomics service for managing genomics resources and workflows. Current public evidence for this domain is sparse, but Google Cloud CLI documentation still identifies `genomics.googleapis.com` as the default endpoint for the `gcloud genomics` command group.
summary: genomics.googleapis.com exposes a Google Genomics HTTP API at `https://genomics.googleapis.com/`, plus the `gcloud alpha genomics` CLI command group that targets it; both use Google Cloud credentials.
